faq.title: Help & Support
faq.a1: After your meal, show your QR code in the Earn section or on your receipt at the restaurant. Points are credited to your wallet.
faq.a2: Earn shows your customer code. Show it at the restaurant to link your purchase to your loyalty account.
faq.q3: How do I redeem an offer?
faq.a3: In Rewards, pick an offer you can afford and tap Redeem. The voucher will be available in your wallet.
faq.a4: Validity rules depend on the programme. Check conditions at the restaurant or contact support.
faq.q5: Can I use points at all restaurants?
faq.a5: Your balance is shared across JD group restaurants. Some offers may only be valid at one location.
faq.q6: How do I change my details?
faq.a6: Go to Account → Edit Profile to update your name, phone and app language.
faq.a7: On the sign-in page, use password recovery by email (when available) or contact support.
faq.a8: See the Privacy Policy under Account. Data is processed in line with applicable law.

legal.placeholderIntro: This text is a placeholder until we receive the final version from the client.
legal.termsS1: By using the JD Chef Domingos app, you accept these terms. If you do not agree, do not use the app.
legal.termsS2: Points and rewards are managed by the loyalty partner. Balance and offers may change according to programme rules.
legal.termsS3: You are responsible for keeping your account credentials confidential and for all activity on your account.
legal.privacyS1: The data controller is Grupo PIE / JD restaurant network, reachable at grupopie@grupopie.com.
legal.privacyS2: We collect account data (name, email, optional phone), points history and app preferences.
legal.privacyS3: Data is used to run the loyalty programme, authorised communications and service improvement.
